title: Casparia jenningsii
taxonomy: Casparia jenningsii is classified within the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family includes around 600 genera and over 13,000 species of plants. The species Casparia jenningsii is further classified within the subfamily Ixoroideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies within the Rubiaceae family. The subfamily Ixoroideae is characterized by its diverse range of species, including trees, shrubs, and herbaceous plants. The specific classification of Casparia jenningsii within the Rubiaceae family and subfamily Ixoroideae highlights its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the family.
